block.text: Down a side-street you hear the sounds Of purpose ful action. Peering cautiously around the comer, you see that the sounds—banging, clanging noises— are coming from a shop marked 'Robot Repair'. The shop door, naturally, is big enougl. for a robot to enter, and is invitingly open. If you enter and investigate, turn to 317. If you go on your way, turn to to.
